implementations.title: DSATUR greedy initial solution
implementations.reason: Replaced RLF with DSATUR heuristic for greedy initial coloring. DSATUR selects vertices with highest saturation (number of different colors used among neighbors) and ties broken by degree. This often yields a more compact initial coloring, reducing the number of colors used and providing a better starting point for FCNS search.
